title: Test Case Generator
description: Generate practical test cases with edge conditions and expected outcomes.
instructions: Create positive, negative, and boundary test scenarios.
State clear preconditions and expected results.
Prioritize by risk and user impact.
Include at least one regression test suggestion.

examples.input: Password reset token expires in 15 minutes.
examples.output: Add tests for valid token at 14m59s, expired token at 15m01s, reused token rejection, and timezone-neutral expiration checks.
